prompt: Build a small HTML page showing a comparison table of 3 model architectures (Transformer, Mamba, RWKV) with columns for parameters, speed, and memory usage. Save as .html.

assertions.description: A .html file exists in the outputs directory
CSS references Anthropic hex values (#141413, #D97757, #FAF9F5, etc.)
References Styrene B LC or the Helvetica/Arial fallback stack
